title: Toasted Ukrainian Cheese Pull Kebabs with Chocolate Swirls
description: Indulge in this nutty, sweet, and savory Ukrainian dish featuring gooey cheese pull and rich milk chocolate. Perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium heat (around 375°F/190°C).
Prepare the cheese mixture by crumbling the borscht cheese into a large bowl.
Whisk the eggs in a separate bowl and add to the cheese mixture. Mix well until combined.
Stir in the milk chocolate chips until the cheese mixture is evenly coated.
Knead the mixture for about 5 minutes until it forms a cohesive dough.
Cut the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired kebab size.
Thread each piece onto skewers, leaving a small gap between each piece.
Dust the kebabs with flour, shaking off excess.
Brush the bread slices with butter on both sides.
Grill the bread slices until lightly toasted, then set aside.
Brush the kebabs with a little bit of butter and place on the grill, cook for 2-3 minutes per side or until golden brown.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them cool for 1-2 minutes before serving with toasted bread.
